reasoning: I will provide a concise paraphrase of the input: it describes a component that gracefully closes all currently connected client connections without settling or broadcasting payment transactions, notes that settlement must be done via stored payment channel server states per wallet, and lists the involved components and the public API signature for starting the service.
output: Description: This module gracefully closes all currently connected client connections. It does not settle the actual payment channels or broadcast payment transactions; settlement must be performed using the stored payment channel server states that manage the states for the associated wallet. The system comprises: HandlerFactory (eventHandlerFactory), NioServer (server), Wallet (wallet), TransactionBroadcaster (broadcaster), ProtobufParser.Listener<Protos.TwoWayChannelMessage> (protobufHandlerListener), ProtobufParser<Protos.TwoWayChannelMessage> socketProtobufHandler, int timeoutSeconds (timeoutSeconds), PaymentChannelServer (paymentChannelManager), PaymentChannelCloseException.CloseReason (closeReason), Coin (minAcceptedChannelSize), ServerConnectionEventHandler (eventHandler). Exposed API: void bindAndStart(ServerConnectionEventHandler onNewConnection).
